ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "scores" TEXT /* Sentiment scores in JSON format */,
  "compound" REAL /* Overall compound score of the review */,
  "comp_score" TEXT /* Comp score indicating the overall sentiment classification */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., social media, app, forum) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album being reviewed */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist associated with the album */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is flagged for moderation */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the review after moderation (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES albums ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or profile description */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews submitted by the user */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the user's reputation or influence */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity on the platform */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is an admin */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is banned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_title" TEXT /* Title of the album or soundtrack */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist associated with the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist associated with the album */,
  "track_count" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the album */,
  "album_cover_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover image */,
  "album_description" TEXT /* Description of the album */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the album is a compilation */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the album is a single */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album being evaluated */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the album */,
  "average_compound_score" REAL /* Average compound score of the reviews for the album */,
  "positive_count" INTEGER /* Count of positive reviews */,
  "negative_count" INTEGER /* Count of negative reviews */,
  "neutral_count" INTEGER /* Count of neutral reviews */,
  "average_likes" REAL /* Average number of likes per review */,
  "average_dislikes" REAL /* Average number of dislikes per review */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_statistics_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for sentiment analysis (e.g., NLP model version) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the NLP model used for analysis */,
  "is_manual_override" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the analysis was manually overridden */,
  "manual_override_reason" TEXT /* Reason for manual override (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the review */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access was anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
